0.text: Multilobar, multisegmentary central-peripherally located nodular-patchy ground glass opacities forming a crazy paving pattern in both lungs

1.text: Linear atelectasis in the right middle lobe, left lower lingular segment, and basal segments of both lower lobes

2.text: Subpleural lines in the right middle lobe, left lower lingular segment, and basal segments of both lower lobes
